chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1728 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 02.02.2026 Syed Zafar Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Manzoor Ahmed Larik, Advocate for respondent-university Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wasan, Assistant Advocate General ************** Counsel for the petitioner states that he does not wish to press the instant Constitution Petition and intend to seek appropriate relief before the learned High Court Bench at Larkana. In view of the statement made by learned counsel, the instant Constitution Petition is dismissed as not pressed, with liberty to the petitioner to approach the appropriate forum, in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E
